translations.home.test-dialog.title: Material Dialog Shell
translations.home.test-dialog.message: This dialog uses Angular Material for the overlay and accessibility behavior, but the layout and mobile treatment are styled to feel like Nostria's custom dialog component.
translations.home.test-dialog.detail.mobile-descripti: On smaller screens the dialog expands edge-to-edge, removes rounded corners, and keeps the action row anchored at the bottom.
translations.home.test-dialog.detail.style-descriptio: The header, spacing, surface tones, and button treatment follow the app's custom dialog language instead of the stock Material appearance.
translations.home.test-dialog.detail.material-descrip: Focus handling, overlay stacking, escape handling, and close interactions still come from Angular Material.

translations.people.empty.none.subtitle: Start by adding people you want to follow
translations.settings.about.title: About Nostria
translations.settings.about.more-info.description: Visit our website for more information, documentation, and support.
translations.settings.about.credits.title: Credits & Acknowledgments
translations.settings.about.credits.description: We would like to extend our heartfelt gratitude to our investors who have made Nostria possible:
translations.settings.about.credits.thanks: Thank you for believing in our vision of making the Nostr protocol accessible to everyone and supporting the development of a truly decentralized social network.
translations.settings.event-expiration.title: Global Event Expiration
translations.settings.event-expiration.description: When enabled, all events you create will include an expiration tag (NIP-40). Relays may delete expired events and clients should ignore them. This is useful for testing or when you don't want content to persist.
translations.settings.event-expiration.warning: ⚠️ Warning: Expiration is not guaranteed. Events may be stored by third parties before expiring. Do not use this as a security feature for sensitive content.
translations.settings.algorithm.subtitle: Manage your content recommendation algorithm and user engagement metrics
translations.settings.algorithm.privacy.description: All these metrics are locally on your device and not shared with anyone.
translations.settings.algorithm.stats.title: Algorithm Statistics
translations.settings.algorithm.stats.subtitle: Overview of your engagement metrics
translations.settings.algorithm.metrics.title: User Metrics
translations.settings.algorithm.metrics.subtitle: View and manage user engagement data
translations.settings.algorithm.declining.description: Users with declining engagement that might need re-engagement
translations.settings.algorithm.favorites.description: Your favorite users (always ranked at the top)
translations.settings.algorithm.favorites.empty.title: No favorites yet
translations.settings.algorithm.favorites.empty.descr: Add users to your favorites to ensure they always appear at the top of your feed.
translations.settings.algorithm.actions.title: Actions
translations.settings.feed.behavior.title: Feed Behavior
translations.settings.navigation.start-feeds-last-eve: Show previously loaded events first when opening feeds, with new posts appearing via a button. Prevents the feed from jumping to the latest events on reload.
translations.settings.feed.featured-cards.description: Show featured recommendation and promotion cards between feed posts.
translations.settings.navigation.show-thread-lines.de: Display vertical lines on the left side of threaded replies to indicate nesting depth.
translations.settings.navigation.open-threads-expande: When viewing a thread, show all replies expanded by default. Disable for a cleaner initial view with collapsed replies.
translations.settings.release-channel.description: Get early access to new features (Premium)
translations.settings.max-relays.title: Max relays per user
translations.settings.max-relays.description: Number of relays to use per user
translations.settings.relay-mode.title: Relays Mode
translations.settings.relay-mode.description: Choose how relays are selected when querying events for other users.
translations.settings.relay-mode.label: Relays Mode
translations.settings.relay-mode.hybrid.description: Hybrid combines discovered user relays with your current account relays for improved event discovery.
translations.settings.relay-mode.outbox.description: Outbox queries only the relays discovered from the target user (kind 10002 or kind 3).
translations.settings.auto-relay-auth.title: Relay Authentication
translations.settings.auto-relay-auth.description: Automatically authenticate with relays that require authentication. When disabled, relays that require authentication will not be used.
translations.settings.client-tags.title: Client Tags
translations.settings.client-tags.add.description: Add the Nostria client tag to events you publish
translations.settings.client-tags.show.description: Show what client that authors are using
translations.settings.media.title: Media
translations.settings.media.description: Control how media content is displayed based on your following status
translations.settings.media.auto-play-all.description: When enabled, all videos will automatically play muted when they appear in the feed. Short videos (15 seconds or less) will also loop automatically.
translations.settings.music-status.description: When enabled, your currently playing song is shared as a user status so others can see what you're listening to.
translations.settings.calendar.title: Calendar System
translations.settings.calendar.description: Choose your preferred calendar system for displaying dates
translations.settings.calendar.label: Calendar
translations.settings.calendar.gregorian.description: The standard civil calendar used worldwide with 12 months of varying lengths.
translations.settings.calendar.chronia.description: A modern simplified calendar with 13 months of 28 days each, plus Solstice Day. Year 0 begins December 22, 2015.
translations.settings.calendar.ethiopian.description: The traditional Ethiopian calendar with 13 months: 12 months of 30 days and Pagume (5-6 days). Approximately 7-8 years behind Gregorian.
translations.settings.time-format.label: Time Format
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.title: Notification Spam Filter
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.descri: Filter out notifications from events that tag too many accounts. Spammers often mass-tag users to get attention.
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.label: Maximum tagged accounts
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.none.d: All notifications will be shown regardless of how many accounts are tagged in the event.
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.active: Events tagging more than {$INTERPOLATION} accounts will not generate notifications.
translations.settings.logging.debug.description: Shows all log messages including detailed debug information.
translations.settings.logging.info.description: Shows informational messages, warnings and errors.
translations.settings.external-links.title: External Links
translations.settings.external-links.description: Configure which external domains should open within the app instead of a new browser tab
translations.settings.title: Settings
translations.settings.display.title: Display
translations.settings.display.lock-screen-rotation.de: Keep the app in portrait mode so it does not rotate when your device rotates. Applies only on devices and browsers that support orientation lock.
translations.settings.reactions.title: Reactions
translations.settings.reactions.default-emoji.descrip: Choose the emoji sent when you single-tap the reaction button. Long-press opens the full emoji picker.
translations.settings.action-buttons.title: Action Buttons
translations.settings.action-buttons.description: Choose how the action buttons (Like, Reply, Share, etc.) are displayed below posts and replies. You can also right-click or long-press the expand button on any post to cycle through modes.
translations.settings.navigation.title: Navigation
translations.settings.navigation.start-last-page.desc: When opening the app, restore the last page you were viewing.
translations.settings.layout.right-sidebar.descriptio: Show the desktop right sidebar with Favorites and Runes. This syncs with your account settings across devices.
translations.settings.privacy.analytics.title: Analytics
translations.settings.privacy.analytics.description: Analytics is strictly opt-in and applies to all accounts in this app on this device. If you enable it, analytics logs and diagnostics data will be uploaded to a cloud provider to help the developers improve quality and reliability.
translations.settings.logs.title: Logs
translations.settings.logs.description: Relay statistics, all relays, and cluster analysis for troubleshooting.
translations.settings.debug.description: Platform simulation and developer-focused payment flow testing tools.
translations.settings.logs.relay-stats.title: Relay Statistics
translations.settings.privacy.url.title: URL Privacy
translations.settings.privacy.url.remove-tracking: Remove tracking parameters from pasted URLs
translations.settings.privacy.image-cache.title: Image Cache Service
translations.settings.privacy.social-sharing.title: Social Sharing Options
translations.settings.privacy.reported.title: Reported Content Settings
translations.settings.privacy.reported.description: Choose which types of reported content to automatically hide. When content is hidden, you can still choose to reveal it.
translations.settings.privacy.blocked.title: Blocked Accounts
translations.settings.privacy.muted-words.title: Muted Words
translations.settings.privacy.muted-tags.title: Muted Tags
translations.settings.privacy.muted-threads.title: Muted Threads
translations.settings.privacy.remove-content.title: Remove My Content
translations.settings.privacy.event-management.descri: Manage and delete events you've published on Nostr.
translations.settings.privacy.remove-content.delete-e: Choose an event and review the removal flow.
translations.settings.privacy.remove-content.delete-a: Open the account data removal screen and review the available options.
translations.settings.privacy.info.tracking.title: URL Tracking Parameter Removal
translations.settings.privacy.info.tracking.p1: When enabled, tracking parameters are automatically removed from URLs you paste.
translations.settings.privacy.info.tracking.p2: This removes parameters like utm_*, fbclid, gclid, and other tracking codes used by YouTube, Twitter/X, Facebook, and other platforms to track your activity across the web.
translations.settings.privacy.info.tracking.p3: Disable if you need to preserve all URL parameters, though this may reduce your privacy.
translations.settings.privacy.info.image-cache.title: Image Cache Service
translations.settings.privacy.info.image-cache.p1: When enabled, profile images and other images are optimized and cached using Angular Service Worker for improved loading times and offline availability.
translations.settings.privacy.info.image-cache.p2: Images are cached for up to 7 days and automatically managed. This reduces bandwidth usage and improves performance, especially on slower connections.
translations.settings.privacy.info.image-cache.p3: Disable if you want to ensure images are always loaded directly from the source, which will increase bandwidth usage and loading times.
translations.settings.privacy.info.social.title: Social Sharing Preview
translations.settings.privacy.info.social.description: When enabled, content previews will be shown for external links shared in posts.
translations.settings.privacy.info.google-favicon.p1: When enabled, favicons (small website icons) are fetched using Google's favicon service, which provides reliable icons for most websites.
translations.settings.privacy.info.google-favicon.p2: {$START_TAG_STRONG}Privacy note:{$CLOSE_TAG_STRONG} This sends the domain names you visit to Google's servers. Google may log these requests and associate them with your IP address.
translations.settings.privacy.info.google-favicon.p3: When disabled (default), favicons are fetched directly from each website's server, which is more private but may fail for some sites that don't have a standard favicon.ico file.
translations.settings.privacy.title: Privacy & Safety
translations.settings.profile.edit.description: Update your name, picture, bio, and profile links
translations.settings.relays.title: Relay Sources
translations.settings.relays.discovery.description: Relays used to discover other users
translations.settings.search.relays.description: Configure which relays to use for search
translations.settings.media-servers.title: Media Servers
translations.settings.media-servers.description: Manage your upload and fallback media servers
translations.settings.relays.observed.description: Inspect relays observed from the wider network.
translations.settings.relays.no-relays.title: No Account Relays Configured
translations.settings.relays.no-relays.description: You don't have any relays configured yet. Relays are essential for using Nostr.
translations.settings.relays.manual-add: Or manually add a relay using the input below
translations.settings.relays.malformed.title: Malformed Relay Configuration Detected
translations.settings.relays.malformed.description: Your relay list (kind 10002) was created by another Nostr client with incorrect tag names. The event uses 'relay' tags instead of the correct 'r' tags according to the Nostr protocol.
translations.settings.relays.malformed.action: This may prevent some Nostr clients from properly loading your relays. Click the button below to automatically repair and republish your relay list with the correct format.
translations.settings.relays.message-relays-descripti: Relays used for receiving direct messages (NIP-17)
translations.settings.relays.no-message-relays: No message relays configured. Sync with your account relays or add one manually.
translations.settings.relays.deprecated.title: Deprecated Warning
translations.settings.relays.deprecated.description: Your following list contains a list of {$INTERPOLATION} relays. This is deprecated in the protocol.
translations.settings.relays.deprecated.migrate-hint: If you have historical events on these old relays, you can migrate them to your current Account Relays to ensure your data is not lost.
translations.settings.relays.discovery.subtitle: These relays are used for discovery of Relay Lists of users
translations.settings.relays.discovery.empty.title: You don't have any discovery relays configured.
translations.settings.relays.discovery.empty.descript: Add a discovery relay using the input above.
translations.settings.relays.observed.empty.title: No Observed Relays
translations.settings.relays.observed.empty.descripti: Relay statistics will appear here as you interact with the network.
translations.settings.relays.observed.nip11.title: Relay Information (NIP-11)
translations.settings.relays.observed.nip11.name: Name:
translations.settings.relays.observed.nip11.unavailab: Unable to fetch relay information. The relay may not support NIP-11.
translations.settings.relays.info.title: How Your Relays Work
translations.settings.relays.info.p1: Account Relays are used to publish your profile and events for others to discovery.
translations.settings.relays.info.p2: Account Relays is your Home. This is where your data is stored and persisted. It's where other users retrieve your events from. Make sure you choose a relay that you trust and that is reliable.
translations.settings.relays.info.p3: You should normally not need more than four relays. You don't need to pick the most popular relays, other user's will still find you thanks to Discovery Relays.
translations.settings.relays.info.p4: When you save Account Relays, your Relays List is additionally publishes to the Discovery Relays to help others find you.
translations.settings.relays.info.p5: The first relay in the list will be used as the relay hint when sharing articles or notes that belong to your account. Drag relays to reorder them.
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.title: How Discovery Relays Work
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.p1: Discovery Relays are used to find which relays other Nostr users prefer. Nostria will attempt to retrieve the User Relay list (kind:10002 events) from these relays, not the profile or other events.
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.p2: After a user's preferred relays have been discovered, Nostria connects to the user's preferred relays to retrieve profile, posts, and other events.
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.p3: You should normally not need more than one or two discovery relays.
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.p4: When you save Your Relays, they are additionally publishes to these Discovery Relays to help others discover You.
translations.settings.search.subtitle: These relays are used when performing search queries (NIP-50)
translations.settings.search.empty.title: You don't have any search relays configured.
translations.settings.search.empty.description: Add a search relay using the input above to enable search functionality.
translations.settings.search.tooltip.p1: Search relays support NIP-50 (Search Capability) and are used to perform text-based searches across Nostr content.
translations.settings.search.tooltip.p2: Your search relay list is stored as a kind 10007 event and synced across your Nostr clients.
translations.settings.search.title: Search Settings
translations.settings.display.font.description: Choose your preferred font for the app. Roboto works best with Angular Material components.
translations.settings.home-destination.title: Home Button Destination
translations.settings.home-destination.description: Choose where the Nostria logo button should navigate to.
translations.settings.home-destination.first-menu-ite: Navigate to the first item in your customized menu
translations.settings.menu.description: Drag items to reorder. Move items between lists to show or hide them.
translations.settings.menu.empty-active: No items in menu. Add items from below.
translations.settings.menu.empty-hidden: All items are visible in menu.
translations.settings.post-to-x.title: Post to X
translations.settings.post-to-x.description: Connect your X account to publish the text of your Nostria posts to X.
translations.settings.post-to-x.premium-only: Post to X is available for Premium+ accounts only.
translations.settings.post-to-x.upgrade: Upgrade to Premium+ to connect or publish to X from Nostria.
translations.settings.post-to-x.connected.description: Your Nostria posts can now also publish to this X account.
translations.settings.post-to-x.mode.single-account: Single X account per Nostria account
translations.settings.post-to-x.note: Reconnect if you want to switch to another X account. Media support includes up to 4 images or 1 video/GIF per post. Quote/reply threading and post edits are not mirrored to X yet.
translations.settings.post-to-x.default-description: When enabled, new posts will start with the X Post to X option turned on in Advanced Options.
translations.settings.post-to-x.connect.description: Only one X account is supported per Nostria account. If you connected the wrong one previously, disconnect it and then connect again with the correct X account.
translations.settings.post-to-x.connect.authorization: You will be redirected to X to authorize Nostria. The backend stores your X access tokens and uses them only when you choose to post to X.
translations.settings.sounds.title: Sounds
translations.settings.sounds.description: Choose which in-app sounds Nostria should play.
translations.settings.sounds.ui-interaction.descripti: Play subtle feedback sounds for likes and other direct UI actions.
translations.settings.sounds.message-notifications.de: Play a short sound when a new unread direct message arrives.
translations.settings.sounds.zaps.description: Play celebratory sound effects when zaps come in.
translations.settings.display.text-size.description: Adjust the text size for better readability. This setting works together with your device's text size settings.
translations.settings.trust.description: Help filter out spam and bots by using reputation scores from trusted services.
translations.settings.trust.services.title: Scoring Services
translations.settings.trust.services.description: These services analyze the Nostr network and calculate reputation scores for accounts.
translations.settings.trust.providers.migrationText: Your account uses the previous Brainstorm trust provider configuration. Click Activate to migrate to the new Brainstorm setup.
translations.settings.trust.providers.migrationWarnin: Warning: this will replace your current service provider configuration in kind 10040.
translations.settings.trust.personalized.title: Personalized Scoring
translations.settings.trust.precache.title: Pre-cache Following Rank Scores
translations.settings.trust.precache.description: Reload rank scores for all followed accounts now so hover cards and profiles open faster.
translations.settings.trust.precache.loadingFollowing: Loading your following list before rank score pre-caching can start.
translations.settings.trust.precache.emptyFollowing: Follow at least one account to pre-cache Web of Trust rank scores.
translations.settings.trust.precache.done: Finished pre-caching rank scores for {$INTERPOLATION} followed accounts.
translations.settings.trust.personalized.no10040: No kind 10040 event is loaded for this account yet.
translations.settings.trust.title: Trust
translations.settings.trust.brainstorm.configFromApi: Brainstorm provider tags configured from API.
translations.settings.trust.brainstorm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while talking to Brainstorm.
translations.streams.dialog.introTitle: Publish your live stream from Nostria
translations.streams.dialog.introDescription: You can push camera and microphone directly to OpenResist from the browser, verify the feed privately, and then publish the Nostr live stream event when ready.
translations.streams.dialog.introDetails: If your provider only gives you a public watch page, Nostria can still publish the live stream event and link viewers there. Add a direct HLS or LiveKit playback URL only when you want inline playback inside Nostria.
translations.streams.dialog.signInRequired: Sign in to publish live streams from Nostria.
translations.streams.dialog.broadcastDescription: Start a private WHIP broadcast first. Nothing is published to Nostr until you click the announce button.
translations.streams.dialog.previewPlaceholder: Prepare the camera to preview your stream here.
translations.streams.dialog.privateModeHint: Private mode is useful for checking framing, permissions, and the provider watch page before you announce.
translations.streams.dialog.watchPageHint: The provider watch page is used as the public link when no inline playback URL is available.
translations.streams.dialog.summaryPlaceholder: What you're streaming, who is joining, and where people can watch.
translations.streams.dialog.identifierHint: Reuse this identifier later if you want to update the same live stream post.
translations.streams.dialog.playbackHint: Optional. Add an HLS (.m3u8) or LiveKit playback URL when you want inline playback in Nostria.
translations.streams.dialog.hashtagsHint: Separate tags with commas or spaces.
translations.streams.dialog.stopBeforeSwitch: Stop the active broadcast before switching providers.
translations.streams.dialog.previewFailed: Failed to prepare the camera preview.
translations.streams.dialog.privateStarted: Private broadcast is live. Publish the Nostr event when you are ready.
translations.streams.dialog.privateFailed: Failed to start the private broadcast.
translations.streams.dialog.stopFailed: Failed to stop the private broadcast cleanly.
translations.streams.dialog.signInFirst: Sign in to publish a live stream.
translations.streams.dialog.titleRequired: Please add a title for your live stream.
translations.streams.dialog.playbackOrPlatformRequire: Add a playback URL or a provider watch page before announcing a live stream.
translations.streams.dialog.publishSuccessWithBroadca: Live stream announced. Your camera broadcast stays live until you stop it from Start Live Stream.
translations.streams.dialog.publishFailed: Failed to publish the live stream. Please try again.
translations.streams.empty.title: No streams found
translations.streams.empty.live: There are no live streams at the moment. Check back later or explore scheduled streams.
translations.streams.empty.scheduled: There are no scheduled streams. Check back later for upcoming events.
translations.streams.empty.ended: There are no ended streams to display.
translations.wallet.add.description: Connect your wallet using Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC). Paste your connection string below.
translations.wallet.connection-string.hint: Paste your Nostr Wallet Connect connection string here
translations.wallet.error.pattern: Invalid connection string format. Must start with nostr+walletconnect:// or web+nostr+walletconnect://
translations.wallet.transfer.title: Transfer Between Wallets
translations.wallet.transfer.subtitle: Move sats from one connected wallet to another
translations.wallet.donation.title: Support Nostria Development
translations.wallet.donation.subtitle: Help us keep building the future of Nostr
translations.wallet.bitcoin-donation.title: On-chain Bitcoin Donation
translations.wallet.bitcoin-donation.subtitle: Support Nostria development with an on-chain Bitcoin donation
translations.wallet.nwc-providers.title: Nostr Wallet Connect Providers
translations.wallet.nwc-providers.subtitle: Get a wallet that supports Nostr Wallet Connect to use with Nostria
translations.wallet.empty.title: No Wallets Connected
translations.wallet.empty.description: Connect your first wallet to start sending and receiving payments.
translations.wallet.transactions.empty.title: No Transactions Yet
translations.wallet.transactions.empty.description: Your transaction history will appear here once you start sending or receiving payments.
translations.wallet.transactions.no-wallet.title: No Wallet Connected
translations.wallet.transactions.no-wallet.descriptio: Connect a wallet to view your transaction history.
translations.wallet.settings.hide-amounts.title: Hide Wallet Amounts
translations.wallet.settings.hide-amounts.subtitle: Hide the amount of sats in your wallet for privacy.
translations.wallet.settings.hide-amounts.info: When enabled, sat amounts in your wallet will be hidden and replaced with asterisks (****). This provides privacy when viewing your wallet on shared or public screens.
translations.wallet.settings.quick-zap.title: Quick Zap Button
translations.wallet.settings.quick-zap.subtitle: Enable a separate quick zap button that sends a preset amount instantly with one click.
translations.wallet.settings.quick-zap.info: When enabled, a quick zap button appears next to the regular zap button. Clicking it instantly sends the configured amount without opening any dialog.
translations.wallet.add.title: Add Wallet
